entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the host plant affected by the chlorotic vein banding disease

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the virus strain was identified

entities.name: CHLOROTIC VEIN BANDING DISEASE
entities.description: A disease of groundnut caused by a specific strain of peanut chlorotic streak virus

entities.name: PEANUT CHLOROTIC STREAK VIRUS
entities.description: A caulimovirus that causes disease in groundnuts, also referred to as PCLSV

entities.name: PCLSV-CVB
entities.description: A specific isolate/strain of peanut chlorotic streak caulimovirus causing chlorotic vein banding

entities.name: DOUBLE-STRANDED DNA
entities.description: The genetic material of the PCLSV-CVB virus, consisting of circular and linear molecules

entities.name: PHYSICAL MAP
entities.description: A technique used to determine the structure, size, and restriction sites of the viral DNA

entities.name: BAM HI
entities.description: A restriction enzyme used to cleave the PCLSV-CVB DNA for cloning

entities.name: PUC 118
entities.description: A cloning vector used to clone the PCLSV-CVB DNA

entities.name: COWPEAS
entities.description: Vigna unguiculata, used as a host plant to test the infectivity of the cloned viral DNA
